title: munnozia convencionensis
intro: Munnozia convencionensis, also known as the Convention Munnozia or Yellow Buttonflower, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant has been found to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving congestion, and soothing coughs, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. The plant's leaves and flowers can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
